title: WOW Skin Science is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)

jsonLd.title: WOW Skin Science is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with WOW Skin Science! We are hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Jabalpur team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About WOW Skin Science:
WOW Skin Science is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WOW Skin Science!
